title: Battle43
description: A Battlefield-style shooter made in Fortnite UEFN.
modalContent:
Battle43 is like a remaster of Battlefield 1943 inside Fortnite, complete with vehicles, classes, and Conquest mode. I created 90% of the models myself, and the rest of the game was all me as well. There are a lot of custom systems, like completely custom UI, capture points, round system, destruction, first person mode & more. Battle43 has received great reviews from Battlefield content creators!

Released March 2024.

Play NowDiscordTrailerReview Video

title: Just Drive
description: Open world driving game with lots of replayability!
highlight: #1 Driving game for 3+ years · Featured by Epic Games
modalContent:
The first of its kind open-world driving game in Fortnite. Large open world to freely drive around. Complete deliveries to earn coins. Spend coins on a new car, special items and car upgrades!

It was very popular for two years with constant updates and engagement from fans. It was featured by Epic Games.

Created in Fortnite Creative, so I had to abandon the project when UEFN came out. I am working on new versions of it.

Released May 2021.

Play NowTrailerTwitter

title: Just Drive: Burning Rubber
description: A racing-focused city driving game in Fortnite.
modalContent:
This edition of Just Drive shifts the focus to racing and immersive city driving.

Play NowTwitter

title: Melon Run
description: A collaborative parkour map for charity.
modalContent:
Worked with lots of other creators to create this parkour map for charity! My level was used for the thumbnail! I also created the collectible mechanic and level tracking.

Play NowView Tweet

title: Constant Survival
description: The first proper survival game in Fortnite.
modalContent:
The first proper survival game in Fortnite, with base building, a hunger system, crafting & more.

Released January 2021.

title: Cache Gun Game
description: A recreation of CS:GO's Cache in Fortnite.
modalContent:
A recreation of Cache from CS:GO. It was a great learning experience to recreate a professional map like this.

Released March 2021.

title: Mafia Heist
description: A co-op mafia roguelike made for Coremaps.
modalContent:
The ultimate mafia roguelike in Fortnite, made while working for Coremaps. Play solo or co-op with up to 4 players, upgrade fusion guns, fight unique bosses and race the speedrun leaderboard.

Play Now

title: Mafia Heist 2
description: The sequel — Mafia Cards and a Prestige system.
modalContent:
The sequel to Mafia Heist, made for Coremaps. Adds collectible Mafia Cards to play with and a Prestige system (up to level 10) with upgrades to life skills, damage, weapons and more.

Play Now

title: Star Wars Breakout
description: A Star Wars roguelike made for Coremaps.
modalContent:
A Star Wars roguelike made for Coremaps. Battle unique bosses, upgrade fusion guns in the weapons shop, and escape a new world to complete your run — as fast as you can for the leaderboard.

Play Now

title: Other Projects
modalContent: Over the years I have released over 50 projects in Fortnite. Many of which are outdated now, but each had a lot of love and effort put into them.

title: Gardener's Dream
description: Place any plant in flower pots, player heads and more.
modalContent:
Allows you to place any plant in flower pots, decorated pots, player heads and half-pots.

Over 1.3 million downloads on Modrinth — my most popular datapack!
